Gradients & Background Images

All gradients and background-images should be PRESERVED (not flattened to black).

Linear Gradient 1

Purple gradient — should be preserved

Linear Gradient 2

Pink gradient — should be preserved

Radial Gradient

Blue gradient — should be preserved

Brand Gradient (Instagram-style)

This gradient MUST be preserved — it's a brand identity element

Background Pattern

Repeating gradient pattern — should be preserved

Background Image

SVG background — should be preserved
